name: AIDLC Outcome Evaluation — BookingService
description: Quality gate guardian for the AIDLC Outcome Evaluation Agent. Validates deployment health of the BookingService across performance, reliability, and resource efficiency objectives. Uses Dynatrace Intelligence auto-adaptive thresholds — static values bootstrap the first 5 validations, then thresholds self-adjust based on observed behavior. Non-blocking — produces advisory verdicts consumed by the evaluation workflow.

objectives.name: P95 Response Time
objectives.description: 95th percentile response time. Auto-adaptive after 5 validations. Bootstrap: warning 2s, fail 3s (observed baseline ~1.6s).
objectives.dqlQuery:
timeseries val = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 95), filter: dt.entity.service == "SERVICE-6B4750F0D8C7C242"
| fields max = arrayMax(val)

objectives.name: Average Response Time
objectives.description: Average response time. Auto-adaptive after 5 validations. Bootstrap: warning 600ms, fail 1s (observed baseline ~380ms).
objectives.dqlQuery:
timeseries val = avg(dt.service.request.response_time), filter: dt.entity.service == "SERVICE-6B4750F0D8C7C242"
| fields avg = arrayAvg(val)

objectives.name: Error Rate
objectives.description: Error rate percentage. Auto-adaptive after 5 validations. Bootstrap: warning 0.5%, fail 2% (observed baseline 0%).
objectives.dqlQuery:
timeseries { err = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count), total = sum(dt.service.request.count) }, filter: dt.entity.service == "SERVICE-6B4750F0D8C7C242"
| fields rate = 100.0 * arraySum(err) / arraySum(total)

objectives.name: Request Throughput
objectives.description: Request throughput per 5min interval. Auto-adaptive after 5 validations. Bootstrap: warning <50, fail <30 (observed baseline ~80). Detects routing or availability issues.
objectives.dqlQuery:
timeseries val = sum(dt.service.request.count), interval: 5m, filter: dt.entity.service == "SERVICE-6B4750F0D8C7C242"
| fields avg = arrayAvg(val)

objectives.name: Active DAVIS Problems
objectives.description: No active DAVIS problems should be detected on this service. Any problem is a failure signal.
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch events, from:now()-30m
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| filter in(affected_entity_ids, array("SERVICE-6B4750F0D8C7C242"))
| filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate)
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
| summarize problemCount = count()

objectives.name: Error Log Volume
objectives.description: Error log count in evaluation window. Auto-adaptive after 5 validations. Bootstrap: warning 10, fail 50.
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch logs, from:now()-30m
| filter matchesValue(dt.entity.service, "SERVICE-6B4750F0D8C7C242")
| filter loglevel == "ERROR"
| summarize errorCount = count()
